title: Skinomi Screen Protector Compatible with Sony Smartwatch (6-Pack) Clear TechSkin TPU Anti-Bubble HD Film
description:
Protect your Investment
Daily use of your mobile device can cause unsightly scratches, dents, and other unwanted damage. Within a few months, the screen will be difficult to read; the device will decrease in resale value and be embarrassing to show other people. Lower-quality disposable screen protectors seem like a temporary solution for keeping your device looking brand new; though they need constant replacements.
The Only Screen Protector You'll Need
With this problem in mind the founders of Skinomi set out to create a screen protector that's tough, reliable, and long-lasting. Their solution was the Skinomi TechSkin.
Made of a thermoplastic urethane film that is designed to resist abrasion, the TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch provides impact absorbing military-grade protection for your device. The protector is UV resistant, HD Clear, and goes on invisible. A smooth texture and feel makes it easy to navigate your device as if there was nothing applied. The flexible high-grade film is formulated to be
"self-healing"
which makes it able to stretch, absorb, and even repair scratches and impact damage.
Lifetime Guarantee
We're so confident that you'll love the TechSkin that every Screen Protector comes with a
Lifetime Warranty
. If the Skinomi TechSkin wears off, we will replace it.
The anti-bubble installation process is easy and error-proof. Protect your possessions and never worry about having to replace that old screen protector again.
Skinomi Kit Includes:
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
Installation Solution
Installation Solution
Lifetime Warranty
Lifetime Warranty
Made in the USA
Made in the USA
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
features: The TechSkin screen protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch is specifically designed using precise laser cutting technology to offer maximum screen coverage. Material flexibility allows total coverage even on curved devices
Self-Healing, flexible, tough, military-grade thermoplastic urethane, designed to absorb impact. The TechSkin is resistant against scratches, punctures, UV light and will not yellow
Easy, error-proof, and anti-bubble installation. Liquid solution allows adjustments during installation. Significantly reduces dust, oil and fingerprint smudges
Optically transparent, virtually invisible, and HD Clear screen protector with smooth glass-like surface and "True Touch" feel. A great alternative to a typical "static cling" PET screen protector
Lifetime Warranty from Manufacturer. Made in the USA. Includes original Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea
reviews.text: This is a good idea to protect the screen. If you where to scratch it you could just replace the screen saver.

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

description: Looking for a smartwatch that won't break the bank? The iTech Fusion 2 S smartwatch includes high tech features at an affordable price. The iTech Fusion 2 S watch doubles as a fitness tracker - including a calorie counter, pedometer, and a sleep monitor! Receive phone notifications, weather forecasts, and control music right from your wrist! Also includes sports mode such as cycling, baseball, basketball, football, tennis, soccer, golf and walking. So many great features on a full touchscreen dial! Keep up with your busy lifestyle with the iTech Fusion 2 S smartwatch. Complete with convenience, this watch features a motion gesture, so you'll be able to view the screen just by turning your wrist.

Pair your iTech Fusion 2 S smart watch with the iTech Wearables app - compatible with most iOS and Android smartphones.

reviews.title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
reviews.text: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

It tracks your stats, crunches the numbers and gets to know all about your performance, your running form, your training history and even your goals. All you need to focus on is putting one foot in front of the other.Bezel Material: fiber-reinforced polymer.
features: GPS running smartwatch with advanced training features
Battery life: up to 7 days in smartwatch mode and up to 24 hours in GPS mode
Get free adaptive training plans from Garmin Coach, or create your own custom workouts on our Garmin Connect online fitness community

reviews.title: great looking watch and great for running and biking
reviews.text:
I really like this watch. I replaced and old forerunner. (many generation old) It feels great and looks good since you can download and tailor the watch faces. I have downloaded music to it using MediaMonkey and it worked fine. So far, synching with earbuds Jaybird Tarah Pro and Vistas, has been good. The availability of watch faces and activity widgets is nice.
But
Be warned, it takes a little bit to set it up and understand how to understand how to download and update activity widgets. Updating of watch faces isn't too bad. Be patient and read the user guide, there is a lot of functionality you should be aware of whether you use them or not.

reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.text:
Great, does all of the stuff running nerds love. Spotify is a hassle to sync when i want to adjust my playlists. This is especially annoying for podcast listeners such as myself. For this reason, I could have gone without the music upgrade and just used my phone but I still use the music feature a good amount for my shorter speed runs where I need the running jams!

But obviously I didn’t take a star because Garmin is the GOAT

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband, an avid runner, for our anniversary. He is super into tracking, numbers, stats, etc. And he loves this watch! He previously had the Forerunner 235 Garmin but it was probably close to five years old. He had done alot of research on this one verses the newer models and this one still came out ahead and did not disappoint!

reviews.title: great fitness watch!
reviews.text: if you are looking for a smart watch, then this is not for you. however, if you want a fitness watch, then get this one! the gps tracking is great and accurate! it takes a little bit to get used to the buttons and where all the settings are, but i love that i can customize it to do just what i want in terms of display, audio outputs, etc. the band is comfortable and the watch face is a good size to see my stats while working out without being overly cumbersome (i'm a small 5'0" female). i love that it can play my spotify playlists! the only thing of note is that it will not be able to get any data such as weather, sms notifications, calendar updates, emails, phone calls, or send emergency assistance notices unless you have your phone with you and connected via bluetooth. the point of this watch for me was to keep my phone at home so those features don't work during my run, but it does do the fitness tracking and play previously setup spotify playlists, so it's exactly what i want and need. i don't use it for sleep tracking since i only wear it during workouts. love the heart rate monitoring too!

reviews.title: Sleep Tracking and Incoming Call Notification (on android) are EPIC failures
reviews.text:
Overwhelming 5 start reviews really make me skeptical that the reviews themselves are genuine....
Overall the watch is not bad but really needs functional work. The Android Dev/QA team should have some re-training/structuring after releasing this to the general public...
Sleep tracking shows me as sleeping if I am in bed relaxed watching tv during sleep hours, making it useless. I only receive an incoming call notification on the watch if my phone screen is unlocked...
missed calls come in every time..

no problems with GPS, Battery Life, Music , Bluetooth, feeds to 3rd party athletic tracking apps. all those work fine.

Not sure I would buy this again.

This watch has many functions, which I have yet to use, but so far it's cute and I like it!

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

reviews.title: Excellent value for price
reviews.text: I would describe this watch as something for health purposes rather that physical training. I really like the heart rate, blood pressure, and sleep tracker. Pedometer is also pretty accurate. I wish there were more color schemes. Overall it’s a great dupe for an iWatch or Samsung watch for 1/10th of a price.

reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

reviews.title: Exelente
reviews.text: La bateria me dura 14 dias. Pantalla se ve perfectamente bajo el sol. La app connect trabaja muy bien, en la tienda puedo descargar pantallas para el reloj. Resto de las actividades ok. Lo recomiendo

reviews.title: Large Screen-Bright White Band
reviews.text: I like everything about this except that I didn’t realize that the frame and the band would be a Brilliant white! There is a golden strip surrounding the watch face.

reviews.title: Good watch. Has sensory issues
reviews.text: Husband loves his Christmas gift. Only complaint we have is he has flick his wrist multiple times very hard to get it to light up. He plans to see if there’s  anything he can on his end to not have to that. It’s a great watch for the price.

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: This watch did everything I needed it to do.  It keeps very accurate time and has many excellent features.  The ones I was most interested in were the sleep tracker, heart and blood pressure monitor and step counter as these  are medically necessary.  The accuracy was top of the line.  My only issue is this watch caused the area on my skin that contacted the watch to get a bad rash.  While the rash was essentially harmless, it is caused by a chemical reaction in my body.  Not the watches fault, and I've experienced this side effect with other watches in the past.  Now I use it only occasionally and for only a couple of days at a time to still track the previously mentioned condition.  It's a great watch that I would recommend.

reviews.title: Quality
reviews.text: It works well but I was disappointed that I can't answer a call or cancel a incoming call from the watch.

reviews.title: The Perfect Watch
reviews.text: The mobile app is easy to navigate. The watch if very accurate with HR and steps counted. The battery lasts my husband approximately 3 weeks.

reviews.title: Nice watch for the money. Now we see how long it lasts.
reviews.text: Works good so far.

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

reviews.title: Seems to work pretty well for the most part
reviews.text: Setup was easy with a quick app download and it paired with my iPhone 12 without any drama. Biometric tracking seems to work reasonably well with the exception of heart rate, which seems to always read 70 no matter what I'm doing. I'm not too crazy about the aesthetic of the watch, it just looks kind of cheap to me. I got this mainly to use as a health tracking tool and to tell time, not to make and receive calls/texts with, so I haven't setup any of those features yet and may never get around to doing so. So i can't comment on ease of use for any of those features. I did like that there are quite a lot of different watch face designs that can be applied and without any additional purchase. For the price of around $40, this is a pretty smokin' deal for a smart watch, I think.

reviews.title: Not bad for the price
reviews.text:
I’ve tried a few different affordable watches and my biggest issue has been the charging port. They have trouble staying connected with tiny pins and no magnetic pull. So going into this I’m more critical.
Upside is there is definitely a better charging system. It holds in place nicely even though it’s a pretty small pin area it is easier to charge.
The screen does have low sensitivity response. When pairing it it took 3 tries to get it recognize I had tapped the screen.
On a good note it’s reading well and has some great features like heart rate, oxygen, and sleep. Everything lined up well with my normal statistics so I feel it’s pretty accurate.
There’s a variety of images to choose from so you can customize the screen however you would like.
It’s very comfortable. The band holds like a premium watch band. It has a large face that is classy. Aesthetically it’s very nice.
Overall for an affordable smart watch it’s a decent option.

reviews.title: Okay tracker
reviews.text: For the price, it is an okay tracker.  The microphone on the watch is not of great quality as I was told sounded muffled on it.  It does have a lot of features and was quite easy to use but nothing about it made it stand out from the other hundreds of smart watches out on the market.

reviews.title: Cute watch is all I can say
reviews.text: Initially the watch was quick to charge and holds the charge for a couple of days.  The functions were easy to use, and a lot to choose from for the activities I do.  I mainly track my steps, distance, duration, heart rate.  It worked well for a few weeks, then I took it swimming for a few laps in the pool.  That was a mistake, battery stopped working (won't charge anymore).  Sad, I really liked the watch, it's cute but the battery died.

reviews.title: Great Smart watch for the essentials
reviews.text:
I was looking for a good smart watch for my mother. She was a Fitbit user but her Fitbit died after years of use and wanted something with a similar feel.
This watch really worked out for her.
It's got a great screen and a good amount of apps to provide essential uses.
It's able to work with iOS and Android.
It's able to get notifications from apps and make phone calls.
Not a bad product at all.

You can download the kids favorite music to the Kids smartwatch for children to listen to at any time, Kids can set 5 alarm clocks on this toy smart watch to plan their own time. 【Study tool and Fitness tracker】 The kids watch pedometer to count your kids steps and calorie, Recording function - children can listen to what they don't understand repeatedly ,Stopwatch and Coundown can help kids to know how long them take to do the homework.Develop good study and exercise habits.

【Great Gift for Kids】kids smart watch for boys is designed with a 1.54" touch screen, FM, Flashlight and many functions.Toddler watch is best Birthday gift ,Christmas gifts and Festival gift for 3-10 years old girls and boys!

reviews.title: My daughter is obsessed with the watch
reviews.text: This is a perfect alternative of a smart watch. I didn't want to get a real smart watch for my daughter because they are so expensive but she kept insisting on it. Saw this kids watch the other day and bought. She thinks it's an apple watch Haha. She loved it and I'm so happy.

reviews.title: She Loves It!
reviews.text: Picture and video is clear and the games and other things on it are fun. This will also help children to learn time and definitely a good beginners watch for a kid. She figured out how to use many of the features without my help. Lots of great features. She likes to set her alarm clock every morning. This is a great first watch and a perfect gift.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.text:
It's very cute. But let's talk about it.
The Camara was a bit blurry.
Never tried the music option so I don't know.
The pedometer would mark a step even when just moving hands so that wasn't accurate.
We had some trouble setting the alarm clock and set chores.
And the games were cute and fun but killed the battery fast.
I guess I was hopping too much out of this.
It was a gift for my daughter since her timex watch went out. But unfortunately it doesn't have a connect to phone feature where she could receive messages when I'm out and about running errands or late to pick her up from school for that matter. The battery didn't last long and even though my girl liked it, it wasn't too functional for what we needed it for. As I was going to return it my dog had other plans. So yeah the watch didn't survived it's attacker. So it's not dog proofed. Lol 😂

title: UMIDIGI UFit Pro(40mm) Smart Watch Alexa Built-in,Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate, SpO2 and Sleep Monitor, 5ATM Waterproof HD Color Touchscreen for Men Women Compatible with iPhone & Android
features: 🍀【Alexa Built-in】You can talk to Amazon Alexa on your UMIDIGI UFit Pro Smart Watch. Ask questions,play music,set alarms and timers, check the weather, control your smart home devices, and more just by speaking to your watch.

🍀【Two Sizes of HD Color Touch Screen】UFit Pro 44mm have 1.69'' large HD color full screen,UFit Pro 40mm have 1.5'' mini HD color full screen.They have the same function.and ensures smooth operations and 240*280 resolution for you.

🍀【Your personal health tracker】Blood Oxygen(SpO2) Monitor,High Precision Real-Time Heart Rate Monitor,Sleep Monitor,Stress Level Monitor and Health Reminders.All are key indicators of your overall wellness. They Track Your Health Smarter.UMIDIGI UFit Pro smartwatch also automatically records daily steps, Distance Counter，calories burned, active minutes,and understand your physical state

🍀【 Smart Assistant for You】Now you can take a photo on the watch by the remote shutter, or control music playback. Message notifications can be read directly on the watch. And more other features like the Weather forecast, Flashlight, Find My Phone, Alarm are available to let you have a more convenient life.

🍀【Long-lasting Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】UMIDIGI UFit Pro provides long battery life of up to 15 days with daily use. Keep tracking your workout data wherever you go.The Smart Watch is designed with 5ATM waterproof rating(50m waterproof), so no need to worry when you wear it while swimming or sweating out.

reviews.title: I wanted to love it
reviews.text: It really isn't the watches fault that I returned it.  It did all it said it would do, the Alexa feature worked, the heart rate monitor worked , the picture was bright, among other things. I didn't like that if you use the timer ( which I use frequently at my job) you can't go back to the main screen, if you do it turns off the timer, but you can use Alexa as a timer and don't have to stay on the same screen so there is a work around. I was also dissapointed with the fact there were only 4 face choices.  But, the reason I returned it is that my phone is older and it wears down my battery quickly and was causing cpu (?) overload warnings.

reviews.title: Solid watch
reviews.text:
Watch came well packaged and was easy to set up and pair using the provided instructions on the item page. It was made well and kept good time. I have a Motorola phone and it would not stay paired with my phone. The sleep feature never seemed to work because it was constantly disconnecting from the app. It may be a good choice for someone else, but I returned it.

The battery life was excellent and it was a well constructed and comfortable watch

title: iTOUCH Explorer 3 Smartwatch (with Heart Rate Tracking, Step Counter, Notifications)
features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. Control your phone’s music without taking it out of your pocket with Music Remote. Set reminders to drink more water, wash hands, even get up and move around when you’ve been sitting too long. Open our mobile app to track female health, log meals, water intake, weight changes and caffeine consumption.

RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! MOBILE PHONE COMPATIBILITY: Connect your Explorer 3 to any Android or iPhone using the iTouch Wearables app*. (*requires iOS 13 or higher and Android 9 or higher)

reviews.title: The itouch EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is great for monitoring your health
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:1dfba93f62e565c5c393181e1d06cded]] What I liked about the ITOUCH EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is the very accurate way it keeps track of your health it’s designed with your health in mind it’s easy to use and very easy to setup and stylish and sturdy comfortable wrist band and the battery life is fantastic easy to read dial and it’s a good value for your money it makes a great gift

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Active2 - IP68 Water Resistant, Aluminum Bezel, GPS, Heart Rate, Fitness Bluetooth Smartwatch - International Version (R830 - 40mm, Aqua Black) (Renewed)
description: This pre-owned or refurbished product has been professionally inspected and tested to work and look like new. How a product becomes part of Amazon Renewed, your destination for pre-owned, refurbished products: A customer buys a new product and returns it or trades it in for a newer or different model. That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.
features: 40mm model: 1.2" display, 247 mAh battery, 44mm model: 1.4" display, 340 mAh battery, Heart and Health Monitoring, Circular Super AMOLED (360 x 360) - Full Color Always On Display - Corning Gorilla Glass DX+ - Processor: 1.15 GHz Dual-Core
Lightweight Design - 5ATM + IP68 / MIL-STD-810G - Maximum Depth of Water Resistance: 164 feet - Accelerometer, Gyro, Barometer, HRM, Ambient Light - Compatible with a 20mm standard strap
Advance Auto Fitness Tracker and Coaching - 768MB RAM + 4GB Internal Memory - Battery: 247mAh - Bluetooth 5.0
Compatibility: Samsung, other Android: Android 5.0 or higher & RAM 1.5GB above - iPhone: iPhone 5 and above, iOS 9.0 or above. DOES NOT HAVE SAMSUNG PAY.
This item is International Bluetooth Model Watch (**IT DOES NOT SUPPORT 2G, 3G, 4G LTE MOBILE NETWORKS**) International Version - Has NO WARRANTY IN US.

reviews.title: Love this Samsung model!
reviews.text: Super easy to set up, many free watchface styles, battery life is great. This is a replacement for my other one which finally died after years of wear and tear. I tried a few of the later models, I don't have the time to perform long setups. This model is perfect if you want a good, attractive, waterproof watch that has all the apps I need.

title: Cillso Smart Watch for Men, IP68 Waterproof Fitness Tracker, Smartwatch for Android iPhone Phones, Activity Tracker with Heart Rate and Sleep Monitor, 24 Sports Modes, Pedometer, Black
features: More Personal, Clearer Touch Screen: 1.3 inch tempered HD LCD with IPS technology for enhanced color and clarity. And covered with an aluminum alloy frame, so elegant and light to wear, but sturdy and anti-scratch.The smart watch contains 5 dials readily available to choose from along with another 50 more dials within the app. You can also with custom setting your favorite photo from phone album as screen background to meet your daily needs and define different moods.

Your Personal Smart Assistant: Activity tracker (pedometer, calories, distance), heart rate, various sport modes, sleep monitoring,etc. Get notifications of Call, SMS, and APP messages(The fitness tracker watch can not make messages, calls or text back), remote control of music and cameras, weather report, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, find phone, call rejection, brightness adjustment, power-saving mode, and other functions to meet your daily needs.

Long Battery and IP68 Waterproof: The waterproof smart watch can be used for 10-15 days or 30 days standby time, much longer than most traditional smartwatch, and only takes 2.5 hours to charge. The fitness watch is IP68 waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain(Note: Do Not use in water more than 100. 40℉, such as showers, saunas, spring, etc).

24 Sports Modes and Health Monitoring: Our fitness tracker for men women supports 24 sports modes and allows you to record fitness data including steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked. Advanced HR sensor for accurate and effective heart rate monitoring, helping you better understand your health and making a reasonable adjustment to your lifestyle. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis to help become healthier.

Smart Notifications and Compatibility: The rugged smart watch is compatible with most iOS 9.0 & Android 5.0 or higher smart phones. Pair our activity tracker to your phone and receive all your SNS notifications straight to your round smart watch including Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Whatsapp, and more (Please note: messages are for viewing only). And support control the music playback or camera on your smartphone.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
Pretty good smartwatch. I needed something to replace my Galaxy Active, but didn't want to spend $100+ on something with a horrible battery life. I bought this one and for a while I was disappointed. I had to charge the watch each night and the steps weren't as accurate. I changed the setting so that the screen doesn't turn on when you move your wrist and that has saved the battery big time. I'm on day 4 and only down to 50% which means I'm now able to track sleep as well. I still think the steps aren't as accurate because it almost matches the steps in my phone's health app, but I'm notorious for leaving my phone places. I also miss being able to limit the options for exercise types in the watch face. I have to scroll through a long list each time. Overall, pretty good product for a cheaper price.

Update: I originally gave this 5 stars, but I have to take 2 away. A few days ago, the watch all of a sudden stopped counting steps. For the price, it was perfect until it stopped working. Back to the drawing board.

reviews.title: The perfect watch
reviews.text: Hubby loves his birthday watch , has no complaints. Says it’s the perfect watch, for all he uses it for. .
